title: Bowerbird Schema
description: Schema for defining types, fields, and configuration for markdown vaults

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON Schema for editor support

schemaVersion.description: User-controlled schema content version for migrations (semver)

link_format.description: Link format for relation fields: wikilink ("[[Note]]") or markdown ("[Note](Note.md)")

obsidian_vault.description: Obsidian vault name for URI scheme (auto-detected if not set)

default_dashboard.description: Dashboard to run when `bwrb dashboard` is called without arguments

date_format.description: Date format for date fields (defaults to YYYY-MM-DD)

allowed_extra_fields.description: Extra frontmatter fields that are allowed without warning

output_dir.description: Directory path relative to vault root where files of this type are created

frontmatter_order.description: Order of frontmatter fields (keys from frontmatter object)

body_sections.description: Body sections to generate after frontmatter

typeNode.description: Recursive type family or leaf definition

plural.description: Custom plural form for folder naming (e.g., 'research' instead of 'researches')

description.description: Human-readable description of what this type is for and when to use it. Surfaced by `bwrb schema list`.

recursive.description: Whether this type can contain instances of itself

value.description: Static value (use $NOW for current datetime, $TODAY for date)

prompt.description: Type of prompt: text (free text), select (from enum), relation (from vault query), list (comma-separated list), date (date picker), boolean (yes/no), number (numeric input)

label.description: Label shown to user for input prompts (the imperative prompt text, e.g. "Select status"). Distinct from `description`, which explains what the field is for.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this field is for and when to use it. Surfaced by `bwrb schema list`; distinct from `label`.

value.description: The option value stored in frontmatter

description.description: What this option means / when to choose it

options.description: Allowed values for select fields (inline options). Each entry is a bare value or a { value, description } pair that documents what the option means.

source.description: Type name(s) for relation prompts. When a relation's value is ambiguous because two notes share a name, path-qualify the link (e.g. `[[contexts/Betson]]`); see the search command docs for the shortest-unambiguous-form rule.

filter.description: Filter conditions for type-based source queries

multiple.description: Whether this field can hold multiple values

owned.description: Whether children referenced by this field are owned (colocate with parent)

alias.description: Field role: marks this field as holding the entity's aliases (alternate names). bwrb consults aliases during name resolution and linking, so an entity is findable by its aliases wherever it is findable by its name. The value must be an array of non-empty, unique strings (Obsidian `aliases` format).

default.description: Default value if user skips the prompt

required.description: Whether this field is required (user cannot skip)

list_format.description: For list fields, how to format the list

content_type.description: Type of content placeholder to add

prompt.description: If set, prompts user for initial content during creation

not_equals.description: Field must not equal this value

in.description: Field must be one of these values

not_in.description: Field must not be one of these values
